_doc: Konfigurasi test suite BEXA via Bluetooth SPP (FTM Frame: header 0x0E, CRC16 KERMIT).
label: BEXA

tests.name: config_request
tests.label: Config Request
tests.description: Baca konfigurasi device: sensor rows/cols, versi, status semua peripheral

tests.name: battery_request
tests.label: Battery Status
tests.description: Baca status charging dan level baterai

tests.name: get_bt_info
tests.label: Get Bluetooth Info
tests.description: FTM 0x00 — Baca info Bluetooth (MAC, versi) via DEBUG UART

tests.name: get_tactile_info
tests.label: Get Tactile Sensor Info
tests.description: FTM 0x01 — Baca info Tactile Sensor via DEBUG UART

tests.name: get_haptic_info
tests.label: Get Haptic Info
tests.description: FTM 0x02 — Baca info Haptic Motor via DEBUG UART

tests.name: get_coulomb_info
tests.label: Get Coulomb Counter Info
tests.description: FTM 0x03 — Baca info Coulomb Counter via DEBUG UART

tests.name: tactile_read
tests.label: Tactile Sensor Read
tests.description: FTM 0x05 — Baca data mentah Tactile Sensor

tests.name: coulomb_read
tests.label: Coulomb Counter Read
tests.description: FTM 0x07 — Baca ACR, Voltage, dan Temperature dari Coulomb Counter

tests.name: charging_info
tests.label: Charging Info
tests.description: FTM 0x0F — Baca status charging dan info daya

tests.name: haptic_vibrating
tests.label: Haptic Vibrating
tests.description: FTM 0x06 — Haptic motor bergetar bergantian kiri dan kanan

tests.name: led_action_rgb
tests.label: LED Action RGB
tests.description: FTM 0x08 — LED Action berkedip Merah → Hijau → Biru

tests.name: led_power_rgb
tests.label: LED Power RGB
tests.description: FTM 0x09 — LED Power berkedip Merah → Hijau → Biru

tests.name: lightbar_pulsing
tests.label: Lightbar Pulsing
tests.description: FTM 0x0A — Lightbar pulsing dari 0 ke 8, kiri dan kanan

tests.name: stop
tests.label: Stop Test
tests.description: FTM 0x11 — Hentikan semua test case yang sedang berjalan

tests.name: bt_burst
tests.label: Bluetooth Burst (FCC)
tests.description: FTM 0x04 — Connectionless FCC test. BT akan disconnect! Butuh spectrum analyzer

tests.name: watchdog_reset
tests.label: Watchdog Reset
tests.description: FTM 0x0D — Reset watchdog timer (device mungkin restart)
